title: [FIRRTL] Verilator type-check GCT Views Test
body:
Copy the body of the Grand Central Views test over to an integration test.  Run the `-verilog` and `-split-verilog`/extraction output through Verilator `--lint-only` to type check this.  By type-check, I primarily mean assert that the following two things hold:

1. All interfaces are defined
2. All XMRs are correct (indicating that XMRs are using the correct instance names)
